name: Banana Split Shortcakes
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Vanilla or chocolate ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix strawberries and 1/4 cup sugar; let stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
2. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
3. Cut shortening into flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, baking powder, and salt with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
4. Stir in milk just until blended.
5. Turn dough onto lightly floured surface. Knead 20-25 times.
6. Roll out to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut into 6 rounds with a floured 3-inch cutter.
7. Place about 1-inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Split warm shortcakes and place the bottom halves on dessert plates.
10. Top with ice cream, strawberries, and bananas.
11. Top with whipped topping (thawed) and heat fudge sauce; drizzle over shortcakes.
